entries.story: As a Brewery, Hospitality business, or Beer2Beer (B2B) management user, I want to log in and be redirected to my personalized homepage so that I can access platform functionalities relevant to my role.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to create proposals for brewery requests so that I can send tailored offers to breweries.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all brewery sign-up requests so that I can review and approve them.
As a Brewery or Hospitality business, I want to create an account so that I can access and use the Beer 2 Beer platform.
As a Hospitality business, I want to be able to use a shopping cart so that I can continue with my current selection before completing the order.
As a Brewery, I want to add new brands and update existing ones on the platform so that I can keep my product offerings current and relevant for customers.
As a Brewery, I want to modify a product so that I can keep my assortment up to date.
As a Brewery, I want to create a product so that I can offer it for sale on the platform.
As a Brewery, I want to request a sales proposal so that I can offer my products on the Beer 2 Beer platform through order-based commissions.
As a Hospitality business, I want to browse within a catalogue of the beers so that I can see which beers are available on the platform.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all beers and breweries available on the platform so that I can monitor the current offerings.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to create contracts after a proposal is accepted so that we can formalize agreements with breweries.
As a Brewery, I want to sign a contract with Beer 2 Beer so that we can agree on order commissions and delivery capacity.
As a brewery I want to be able to access current and previous contracts in pdf format
As a hospitality business, I want to manage recurring orders created from order templates, including the ability to cancel them, so I can adjust or stop deliveries as needed.
As a hospitality business, I want to create recurring orders based on an order template so that I can schedule multiple deliveries automatically over a set period.
As a hospitality business, I want to modify existing order templates so that I can tailor my product assortment to changing needs over time.
As a hospitality business, I want to create order templates that allow me to reorder my product assortment with a single click, saving time and reducing errors.
As a Brewery, I want to manage my contracts with Beer2Beer so that I can renew them before they expire and avoid service interruptions.
As a Brewery, I want to manage individual orders so that I can notify Hospitality businesses about the order status and updates.
As a Brewery, I want to view an overview of my orders so that I can monitor incoming orders and process them efficiently.
As a Hospitality business, I want to manage my order templates so that I can quickly reorder the same selection at different times.
As a Hospitality business, I want to pay for my order so that the order can be processed and delivered.
As a Hospitality business, I want to create a beer order at Beer2Beer so that I can receive the beers for my business from multiple breweries.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all breweries with accounts on the platform so that I can see our current client base.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view the logic operation's performance.

entries.story: As a Brewery, Hospitality business, or Beer2Beer (B2B) management user, I want to log in and be redirected to my personalized homepage so that I can access platform functionalities relevant to my role.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to create proposals for brewery requests so that I can send tailored offers to breweries.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all brewery sign-up requests so that I can review and approve them.
As a Brewery or Hospitality business, I want to create an account so that I can access and use the Beer 2 Beer platform.
As a Hospitality business, I want to be able to use a shopping cart so that I can continue with my current selection before completing the order.
As a Brewery, I want to add new brands and update existing ones on the platform so that I can keep my product offerings current and relevant for customers.
As a Brewery, I want to modify a product so that I can keep my assortment up to date.
As a Brewery, I want to create a product so that I can offer it for sale on the platform.
As a Brewery, I want to request a sales proposal so that I can offer my products on the Beer 2 Beer platform through order-based commissions.
As a Hospitality business, I want to browse within a catalogue of the beers so that I can see which beers are available on the platform.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all beers and breweries available on the platform so that I can monitor the current offerings.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to create contracts after a proposal is accepted so that we can formalize agreements with breweries.
As a Brewery, I want to sign a contract with Beer 2 Beer so that we can agree on order commissions and delivery capacity.
As a brewery I want to be able to access current and previous contracts in pdf format
As a hospitality business, I want to manage recurring orders created from order templates, including the ability to cancel them, so I can adjust or stop deliveries as needed.
As a hospitality business, I want to create recurring orders based on an order template so that I can schedule multiple deliveries automatically over a set period.
As a hospitality business, I want to modify existing order templates so that I can tailor my product assortment to changing needs over time.
As a hospitality business, I want to create order templates that allow me to reorder my product assortment with a single click, saving time and reducing errors.
As a Brewery, I want to manage my contracts with Beer2Beer so that I can renew them before they expire and avoid service interruptions.
As a Brewery, I want to manage individual orders so that I can notify Hospitality businesses about the order status and updates.
As a Brewery, I want to view an overview of my orders so that I can monitor incoming orders and process them efficiently.
As a Hospitality business, I want to manage my order templates so that I can quickly reorder the same selection at different times.
As a Hospitality business, I want to pay for my order so that the order can be processed and delivered.
As a Hospitality business, I want to create a beer order at Beer2Beer so that I can receive the beers for my business from multiple breweries.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all breweries with accounts on the platform so that I can see our current client base.
As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view the logic operation's performance.
